profileUrls.title: LinkedIn Profile URLs
profileUrls.description: List of LinkedIn profile URLs to scrape. Example: https://www.linkedin.com/in/username

maxProfiles.title: Maximum Profiles to Scrape
maxProfiles.description: Maximum number of profiles to scrape (helps control costs on free tier)

delayBetweenRequests.title: Delay Between Requests (ms)
delayBetweenRequests.description: Delay in milliseconds between each profile scrape. Higher values = more polite scraping, less chance of being blocked. Recommended: 2000-5000ms

useApifyProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useApifyProxy.description: Enable Apify proxy (uses more credits but helps avoid IP bans). Note: Free tier has limited proxy access.
